pageDescription: Unlock powerful security features by connecting to Kudu Cloud
pageDescriptionLinked: Manage your cloud connection and device settings
heroDescription: Linking to Kudu Cloud unlocks real-time threat monitoring, AI-powered safety analysis, vulnerability scanning, and a centralized dashboard to manage all your devices from anywhere.
localFeaturesSubtitle: These features activate directly in your Kudu app once linked
featureThreatMonitorDesc: Tracks and alerts you if your computer communicates with ransomware command servers, criminal infrastructure, botnets, or other known-malicious endpoints in real time.
featureVulnerabilityDesc: Scans every installed application against a live database of known security vulnerabilities. Shows severity, affected versions, and available fixes.
featureAiSafetyDesc: AI analyzes every startup program and installed application, rating each on a 1-10 safety scale with detailed explanations. Know exactly what's running on your system.
featureBreachMonitorDesc: Monitors for data breaches associated with your accounts and credentials. Get notified early when your information appears in new breaches.
featureHealthReportsDesc: Automated posture checks covering antivirus, firewall, encryption, Windows Update, password policy, and more — sent to the dashboard every 30 minutes.
localFeaturesNote: Features marked Basic or Pro require an upgraded plan. All other features are included free on the Starter plan for up to 3 devices.
upgradeCalloutTitle: Even with one device, upgrading unlocks more
upgradeCalloutDesc: The free Starter plan gives you dashboards, alerts, and compliance. Upgrading to Basic or Pro adds threat monitoring, AI safety analysis, vulnerability scanning, breach alerts, and automated remediation — features that protect you locally, not just in the cloud.
cloudFeaturesSubtitle: Manage and monitor all your devices from cloud.usekudu.com
featureRemoteDesc: Trigger scans, cleaning, software updates, and power control on any linked device from the web dashboard — no physical access needed.
featureTelemetryDesc: Real-time CPU, memory, disk, and network stats with historical trends. Monitor system health across your entire fleet at a glance.
featureComplianceDesc: Automated security posture analysis covering antivirus, firewall, encryption, updates, and password policy. Build custom compliance rules.
featureAlertsDesc: Configurable notifications for threats, compliance drift, system offline events, and new vulnerabilities. Integrate with email, Slack, and webhooks.
plansSubtitle: Start free, upgrade as you grow
connectDescription: Create a free account or paste your API key to link this device.
alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Paste your API key below.
telemetryDisclaimer: Only CPU & memory usage, disk space, network stats, uptime, and periodic health reports ({{registryExtra}}updates, privacy, malware). No file paths or personal data.
linkFailedDefaultDesc: Check your API key and try again
linkFailedConnectionDesc: Could not connect to cloud server
reconnectFailedDesc: Check your network connection and try again
shareDiskHealthDesc: Include disk SMART data in telemetry
threatMonitorDesc: Scan connections against known-malicious IPs and domains
threatListDescWaiting: Waiting for cloud to push a threat list
cveMonitorDesc: Scan installed software for known security vulnerabilities
remotePowerDesc: Allow cloud to shutdown or restart this device
remoteCleanupDescWindows: Allow cloud to delete files, remove bloatware, and fix registry
remoteCleanupDescOther: Allow cloud to delete files and perform cleanup
remoteInstallsDescWindows: Allow cloud to install software, driver, and Windows updates
remoteInstallsDescOther: Allow cloud to install software and system updates
remoteConfigDesc: Allow cloud to toggle startup items, services, and privacy settings
telemetryIntervalDesc: How often system stats are sent
